patches.name: Add Gboard Signature Bypass
patches.description: Bypass Gboard signature whitelist checks and force them to pass.

patches.name: Clipboard Enhancements
patches.description: Enhance clipboard retention time, item count limits, preview lines, countdown and creation-time labels, order index, and grid columns. Use the gear for per-feature options.

patches.name: Clipboard Entity Extraction
patches.description: Enable Clipboard > Show addresses, phone numbers, and other items pulled from recently copied text.

patches.name: Clipboard Item Edit
patches.description: Enable Edit when long-pressing a clipboard item.

patches.name: Custom Symbols
patches.description: Add a dedicated custom symbols tab and replace the long-press comma entry with a heart shortcut.

patches.name: Emojis, stickers & GIFs Tab Order
patches.description: Customize the bottom tab order in Gboard's Emojis, stickers & GIFs panel with drag-and-drop reordering.

patches.name: Enable Undo/Redo feature
patches.description: Enable the Undo and Redo entry points in Gboard.

patches.name: Feature Flags
patches.description: Toggle many Gboard hidden/experimental rollout flags individually (use the gear icon). Includes key shapes, accessory/voice widgets, OCR scan text, dictation redesign, settings UI improvements, language search, collapsible keyboard, and more. Great for power users.

options.title: Add flags to Lucky Settings
options.description: Insert a Feature Flags section into Gboard's settings (under Patches/LuckyBoard). There you can toggle every flag on/off at runtime. Each flag has a short description. The individual options below decide which flags appear in the UI (they start off by default and must be manually enabled in Gboard settings to activate).

options.title: Key Shape Selection (more_pill_keys)
options.description: Enable the Key shape picker in Theme details and additional rounded gradations (and our custom less-rounded + horizontal lines when combined with the Key Shape patch).

options.title: Accessory / Floating Keyboard
options.description: Support for accessory keyboard features, floating keyboard elements, and related toolbar widgets.

options.title: Voice Widget / Toolbar
options.description: Enable enhanced voice dictation widget and toolbar integration (pairs well with accessory keyboard flags).

options.title: New Language Search Bar
options.description: Improved language / input method search bar in Gboard settings.

options.title: Two-Pane Settings UI
options.description: Enable two-pane / split view layout for Gboard settings on larger screens or tablets.

options.title: OCR / Scan Text
options.description: Add a 'Scan text' tool/tile (camera OCR) to the toolbar for recognizing and inserting text from photos. May need additional language tags in some setups.

options.title: Voice Dictation Redesign
options.description: Updated voice dictation UI and background treatment for the microphone/voice input.

options.title: Collapse Keyboard Button
options.description: Show a button to collapse/minimize the keyboard (useful with floating or accessory modes).

options.title: Grammar Checker
options.description: Enable Text correction > Grammar check (existing flag).

options.title: Inline Suggestions
options.description: Enable Text correction > Smart Compose / inline suggestions (existing flag).

options.title: Clipboard Entity Extraction
options.description: Enable Clipboard > Show addresses, phones etc. from copied text (existing flag).

options.title: Clipboard Item Edit
options.description: Enable Edit when long-pressing a clipboard item (existing flag).

patches.name: Incognito Enhancements
patches.description: Enable clipboard and voice typing in incognito mode. Also force Gboard to always open in incognito mode to disable typing history collection and personalization. (Ported from Adobo patches by jkennethcarino)

patches.name: Key Shape Selection
patches.description: Enable Key shape selection in Theme details + add more rounded shape gradations (light/medium/strong/very strong/pill) and less rounded + horizontal lines options.

patches.name: Latin Globe Key Ignore Interval
patches.description: Add an independent globe key ignore interval override for post-typing language-switch delay (Latin layouts).

patches.name: Package Rename
patches.description: Rename the package to dev.lucky.com.google.android.inputmethod.latin (and the app to "LuckyBoard") so it can be installed alongside the official Gboard.

patches.name: QWERTY Slide Symbols
patches.description: Enable slide-up and slide-down symbol input on QWERTY keyboards (English and other Latin layouts where supported).

patches.name: Replace Gboard with LuckyBoard
patches.description: Replace occurrences of "Gboard" with "LuckyBoard" in resources, strings and manifest during patching for complete UI rebranding (beyond the app label set by Package Rename).

patches.name: Settings Homepage Override
patches.description: Allow switching between the new and legacy Gboard settings pages.

patches.name: Web Clipboard
patches.description: Add the phone-hosted Web Clipboard with browser sync, pairing, and a Quick Settings Tile.
